tools.name: Aceternity UI
tools.description: Modern UI components with heavy focus on animations. Built with Framer Motion and Tailwind CSS. Premium feel for React apps.

tools.name: Anima
tools.description: Convert Figma, Adobe XD, and Sketch designs to React, Vue, or HTML code. AI-powered design-to-code with responsive layouts.

tools.name: Animate.css
tools.description: Library of ready-to-use cross-browser CSS animations. Attention seekers, entrances, exits, and more. Just add class names.

tools.name: Anime.js
tools.description: Lightweight JavaScript animation library. Works with CSS, SVG, DOM attributes, and JavaScript Objects. Simple API with powerful features.

tools.name: Ant Design
tools.description: Enterprise-class UI design system with React components. Rich component library perfect for admin dashboards and data-heavy applications.

tools.name: AOS (Animate On Scroll)
tools.description: Scroll-triggered animations made easy. Simple data attributes, no JavaScript required. Great for landing pages and marketing sites.

tools.name: Atropos
tools.description: Stunning touch-friendly 3D parallax hover effects. Lightweight, dependency-free library for creating depth and immersion.

tools.name: Awwwards
tools.description: Recognizes the talent and effort of the best web designers worldwide. Daily inspiration from award-winning websites.

tools.name: Behance
tools.description: Adobe's creative showcase platform. Discover portfolios from designers worldwide and showcase your own creative work.

tools.name: Builder.io
tools.description: Visual development platform for building and optimizing digital experiences. Drag-and-drop editor with headless CMS capabilities.

tools.name: Chakra UI
tools.description: Simple, modular, and accessible React component library. Built-in dark mode, responsive styles, and excellent developer experience.

tools.name: CodePen
tools.description: Social development environment for front-end code. Discover, create, and share HTML, CSS, and JavaScript snippets. Huge inspiration library.

tools.name: CSS-Tricks
tools.description: Daily articles about CSS, HTML, JavaScript, and web design. Tutorials, guides, and the Almanac reference for all things web.

tools.name: cssdb
tools.description: Comprehensive catalog of CSS features and their implementation status. Track what's available across browsers.

tools.name: DaisyUI
tools.description: Tailwind CSS component library with beautiful, customizable components. 30+ themes and pure CSS implementation.

tools.name: Docusaurus
tools.description: Build optimized documentation websites by Meta. MDX support, versioning, i18n, and blazing-fast static site generation.

tools.name: Docz
tools.description: Documentation site generator powered by MDX. Zero config, blazing fast, and easy to customize. Perfect for design systems.

tools.name: Dribbble
tools.description: Community of designers sharing screenshots of their work. Discover UI/UX trends, animations, and micro-interactions. Massive inspiration source.

tools.name: Embla Carousel
tools.description: Lightweight carousel library with fluid touch interactions. Framework-agnostic with plugins for React, Vue, and more.

tools.name: Figma
tools.description: Collaborative interface design tool with prototyping capabilities. Industry standard for UI/UX design. Inspect code, export assets.

tools.name: Framer
tools.description: Design tool that generates production-ready React code. Interactive prototypes with real components. Design and code in one tool.

tools.name: Framer Motion
tools.description: Production-ready motion library for React. Declarative animations, gestures, variants, and layout animations. Perfect for interactive UI components.

tools.name: GitBook
tools.description: Modern documentation platform for teams. Collaborative editing, API docs, changelogs, and beautiful published sites.

tools.name: GSAP (GreenSock)
tools.description: Professional-grade animation library for JavaScript. Smooth 60fps animations, timeline control, and advanced sequencing. Industry standard for web animations.

tools.name: ScrollTrigger
tools.description: GSAP plugin for scroll-based animations. Pin elements, scrub animations, and create stunning scroll experiences with ease.

tools.name: Headless UI
tools.description: Completely unstyled, fully accessible UI components by Tailwind CSS. Perfect for building custom designs with accessibility built in.

tools.name: Hover.css
tools.description: Collection of CSS3 hover effects. Copy-paste ready. Includes effects for links, buttons, logos, SVG, and images.

tools.name: Keen Slider
tools.description: Lightweight, flexible slider with native touch/swipe behavior. No dependencies, fully TypeScript, and framework agnostic.

tools.name: Ladle
tools.description: Faster Storybook alternative powered by Vite. Drop-in replacement with minimal config. Lightning-fast hot module replacement.

tools.name: Lottie
tools.description: Library by Airbnb for rendering After Effects animations as JSON. Lightweight, scalable, and programmatically controllable animations.

tools.name: LottieFiles
tools.description: Marketplace for free and premium Lottie animations. Editor, plugins for Figma/After Effects. Huge library of ready-to-use animations.

tools.name: Magic UI
tools.description: Collection of animated React components. Built with Framer Motion. Copy-paste, customize, and use in your projects.

tools.name: Mantine
tools.description: Feature-rich React component library with 100+ customizable components. Hooks, forms, notifications, and more out of the box.

tools.name: Material-UI (MUI)
tools.description: Comprehensive React component library implementing Google's Material Design. Production-ready components with extensive customization.

tools.name: Microinteractions.com
tools.description: Resources and book by Dan Saffer on designing micro-interactions. Theory, examples, and best practices for delightful UX details.

tools.name: Mobbin
tools.description: Latest mobile and web design patterns from top companies. Save and organize screens, flows, and design inspiration.

tools.name: Motion for React
tools.description: Framer Motion alternative with even smaller bundle size. Simple API for React animations and gestures.

tools.name: Motion Canvas
tools.description: TypeScript library for creating animated videos programmatically. Code-first approach to motion graphics with real-time preview.

tools.name: Motion One
tools.description: Modern, lightweight animation library. 5KB, built on Web Animations API. Fast alternative to GSAP with similar features.

tools.name: Motion UI
tools.description: Sass library for creating flexible UI transitions and animations. Built by the Foundation team. Slide, fade, hinge, and more.

tools.name: Nextra
tools.description: Simple, powerful, and flexible Next.js based documentation framework. Built-in search, syntax highlighting, and beautiful themes.

tools.name: Particles.js
tools.description: Lightweight library for creating particles. Perfect for background effects and interactive particle systems. Highly customizable.

tools.name: Pattern Monster
tools.description: Generate beautiful SVG patterns for backgrounds. Customize colors, scale, and download instantly. Free to use.

tools.name: Popmotion
tools.description: Functional, flexible JavaScript animation library. Spring physics, tweens, and keyframes. Powers Framer Motion under the hood.

tools.name: ProtoPie
tools.description: Advanced prototyping tool for micro-interactions. Sensors, conditions, and formulas for high-fidelity prototypes without code.

tools.name: Radix UI
tools.description: Unstyled, accessible component primitives for React. Build high-quality design systems and web apps. WAI-ARIA compliant.

tools.name: React Spring
tools.description: Spring-physics based animation library for React. Natural, fluid animations with interactive interrupts. High performance.

tools.name: readme.so
tools.description: Simple editor for creating beautiful README files. Markdown templates, drag-and-drop sections, and live preview.

tools.name: Rellax.js
tools.description: Buttery smooth parallax scrolling library. Lightweight and performant. Perfect for creating depth and visual interest.

tools.name: Rive
tools.description: Next-generation interactive animation tool. Real-time, smaller than Lottie, with state machines and input listeners. Game-changer for UI.

tools.name: Rough Notation
tools.description: Animate hand-drawn annotations on web pages. Circle, underline, bracket, and highlight text with a sketchy style.

tools.name: ScrollReveal
tools.description: JavaScript library for easy scroll animations. Reveal elements as they enter the viewport. Smooth and configurable with declarative API.

tools.name: Shadcn/ui
tools.description: Beautifully designed components built with Radix UI and Tailwind CSS. Copy and paste into your apps. Customizable and open source.

tools.name: SiteInspire
tools.description: Showcase of the finest web and interactive design. Curated collection organized by style, type, and subject.

tools.name: Snap.svg
tools.description: Modern SVG JavaScript library by Adobe. Successor to Raphaël. Works with existing SVG and creates new elements.

tools.name: Spline
tools.description: Design and collaborate on 3D content in the browser. Export to web, export code, or embed interactive 3D designs directly.

tools.name: Splitting.js
tools.description: JavaScript micro-library for splitting text and elements. Enables character-by-character or word-by-word animations. Tiny but powerful.

tools.name: Storybook
tools.description: Frontend workshop for building and testing UI components in isolation. Industry standard for component development and documentation.

tools.name: React Styleguidist
tools.description: Isolated React component development environment with living style guide. Write documentation in Markdown and see components live.

tools.name: SVG.js
tools.description: Lightweight library for manipulating and animating SVG. Path morphing, easy syntax, small footprint. Great for icons and illustrations.

tools.name: Swiper
tools.description: Modern mobile touch slider with hardware accelerated transitions. Most modern and feature-rich slider library. Works everywhere.

tools.name: TeleportHQ
tools.description: Collaborative front-end platform with visual builder and code generator. Real-time collaboration and multi-framework export.

tools.name: Three.js
tools.description: JavaScript 3D library. Create GPU-accelerated 3D animations in the browser. WebGL made easy with powerful abstraction.

tools.name: Tilt.js
tools.description: Smooth 3D tilt effect for cards and images. Creates an engaging parallax hover effect with customizable glare and perspective.

tools.name: Typed.js
tools.description: JavaScript typing animation library. Create typewriter effects with customizable speed, backspacing, and looping. Simple and effective.

tools.name: UI Movement
tools.description: Curated collection of UI animations and interactions. Filter by type, platform, and style. Daily inspiration for designers and developers.

tools.name: VitePress
tools.description: Vite-powered static site generator for documentation. Lightning-fast HMR, Vue components in markdown, and minimal configuration.

tools.name: Vivus.js
tools.description: JavaScript library for SVG line drawing animations. Create signature and path reveal effects. Multiple animation types.

tools.name: Mockoon
tools.description: Local API mocking tool for testing and prototyping. Create mock REST APIs in seconds with a simple interface.

tools.name: Tiny Slider
tools.description: Vanilla JavaScript slider with hardware acceleration. No jQuery dependency, responsive, and fully customizable.
